titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

titles.ar: الكافي
titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: إِذَا قَذَفَ الْعَبْدُ الْحُرَّ جُلِدَ ثَمَانِينَ وَ قَالَ هَذَا مِنْ حُقُوقِ النَّاسِ .
arabic.text: إِذَا قَذَفَ الْعَبْدُ الْحُرَّ جُلِدَ ثَمَانِينَ وَ قَالَ هَذَا مِنْ حُقُوقِ النَّاسِ .

segments: Ali Bin Iibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad Bin Usman, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the slave slanders the free, he would be whipped eighty (lashes)’. And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is from the rights of the people’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Iibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad Bin Usman, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the slave slanders the free, he would be whipped eighty (lashes)’. And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is from the rights of the people’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنِ الْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: الكافي
titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَمْلُوكِ يَفْتَرِي عَلَى الْحُرِّ قَالَ يُجْلَدُ ثَمَانِينَ قُلْتُ فَإِنَّهُ زَنَى قَالَ يُجْلَدُ خَمْسِينَ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَمْلُوكِ يَفْتَرِي عَلَى الْحُرِّ قَالَ يُجْلَدُ ثَمَانِينَ قُلْتُ فَإِنَّهُ زَنَى قَالَ يُجْلَدُ خَمْسِينَ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,

‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the slave who fabricates upon the free. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He would be whipped eighty (lashes)’. I said, ‘So if it was adultery?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘he would be whipped fifty (lashes)’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,

‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the slave who fabricates upon the free. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He would be whipped eighty (lashes)’. I said, ‘So if it was adultery?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘he would be whipped fifty (lashes)’.

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ سَمَاعَةَ قَالَ

titles.ar: الكافي
titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ عَبْدٍ افْتَرَى عَلَى حُرٍّ قَالَ يُجْلَدُ ثَمَانِينَ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ عَبْدٍ افْتَرَى عَلَى حُرٍّ قَالَ يُجْلَدُ ثَمَانِينَ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Muhammad Bin Al Fazeyl, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinany,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a slave who fabricated upon a free. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He would be whipped fifty (lashes)’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Muhammad Bin Al Fazeyl, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinany,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a slave who fabricated upon a free. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He would be whipped fifty (lashes)’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ أَبِي الصَّبَّاحِ الْكِنَانِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: الكافي
titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: الْأَمَةِ تَزْنِي قَالَ تُجْلَدُ نِصْفَ حَدِّ الْحُرِّ كَانَ لَهَا زَوْجٌ أَوْ لَمْ يَكُنْ .
arabic.text: الْأَمَةِ تَزْنِي قَالَ تُجْلَدُ نِصْفَ حَدِّ الْحُرِّ كَانَ لَهَا زَوْجٌ أَوْ لَمْ يَكُنْ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Al Haris Bin Al Ahowl, from Bureyd,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws regarding the slave woman who committed adultery. Heasws said: ‘She would be whipped half the Penalty (Hadd) of the free, whether she had a husband for her, or there did not happen to be one’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Al Haris Bin Al Ahowl, from Bureyd, (It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws regarding the slave woman who committed adultery. Heasws said: ‘She would be whipped half the Penalty (Hadd) of the free, whether she had a husband for her, or there did not happen to be one’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنِ الْحَارِثِ بْنِ الْأَحْوَلِ عَنْ بُرَيْدٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فِي

titles.ar: الكافي
titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي عَبْدٍ سَرَقَ وَ اخْتَانَ مِنْ مَالِ مَوْلَاهُ قَالَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ قَطْعٌ .
arabic.text: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي عَبْدٍ سَرَقَ وَ اخْتَانَ مِنْ مَالِ مَوْلَاهُ قَالَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ قَطْعٌ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, altogether from Abdul Rahman Bin Abu Najran, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> judged regarding a slave who stole and betrayed from the wealth of his master. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no cutting upon him’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, altogether from Abdul Rahman Bin Abu Najran, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> judged regarding a slave who stole and betrayed from the wealth of his master. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no cutting upon him’.

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ وَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ جَمِيعاً عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي نَجْرَانَ عَنْ عَاصِمِ بْنِ حُمَيْدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ قَيْسٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: الكافي
titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فَإِذا أُحْصِنَّ قَالَ إِحْصَانُهُنَّ أَنْ يُدْخَلَ بِهِنَّ قُلْتُ إِنْ لَمْ يُدْخَلْ بِهِنَّ أَ مَا عَلَيْهِنَّ حَدٌّ قَالَ بَلَى .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فَإِذا أُحْصِنَّ قَالَ إِحْصَانُهُنَّ أَنْ يُدْخَلَ بِهِنَّ قُلْتُ إِنْ لَمْ يُدْخَلْ بِهِنَّ أَ مَا عَلَيْهِنَّ حَدٌّ قَالَ بَلَى .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Al A’ala Bin Razeyn, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from one of the twoasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about the Words of Allahazwj the High [4:25] and when they are taken in marriage. Heasws said: ‘Their being married is that they have been copulated with’. I said, ‘If he has not copulated with them, is there no Penalty (Hadd) on them?’ Heasws said: ‘Yes (there is)’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Al A’ala Bin Razeyn, from Muhammad Bin Muslim, (It has been narrated) from one of the twoasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about the Words of Allahazwj the High [4:25] and when they are taken in marriage. Heasws said: ‘Their being married is that they have been copulated with’. I said, ‘If he has not copulated with them, is there no Penalty (Hadd) on them?’ Heasws said: ‘Yes (there is)’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنِ الْعَلَاءِ بْنِ رَزِينٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا ( عليهما السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: الكافي
titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَمَةٌ زَنَتْ قَالَ تُجْلَدُ خَمْسِينَ قُلْتُ فَإِنْ عَادَتْ قَالَ تُجْلَدُ خَمْسِينَ قُلْتُ فَيَجِبُ عَلَيْهَا الرَّجْمُ فِي شَيْ‏ءٍ مِنَ الْحَالَاتِ قَالَ إِذَا زَنَتْ ثَمَانَ مَرَّاتٍ يَجِبُ عَلَيْهَا الرَّجْمُ قُلْتُ كَيْفَ صَارَ فِي ثَمَانِ مَرَّاتٍ قَالَ لِأَنَّ الْحُرَّ إِذَا زَنَى أَرْبَعَ مَرَّاتٍ وَ أُقِيمَ عَلَيْهِ الْحَدُّ قُتِلَ فَإِذَا زَنَتِ الْأَمَةُ ثَمَانَ مَرَّاتٍ رُجِمَتْ فِي التَّاسِعَةِ

قُلْتُ وَ مَا الْعِلَّةُ فِي ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ رَحِمَهَا أَنْ يَجْمَعَ عَلَيْهَا رِبْقَ الرِّقِّ وَ حَدَّ الْحُرِّ ثُمَّ قَالَ وَ عَلَى إِمَامِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ أَنْ يَدْفَعَ ثَمَنَهُ إِلَى مَوْلَاهُ مِنْ سَهْمِ الرِّقَابِ .
arabic.text:
قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَمَةٌ زَنَتْ قَالَ تُجْلَدُ خَمْسِينَ قُلْتُ فَإِنْ عَادَتْ قَالَ تُجْلَدُ خَمْسِينَ قُلْتُ فَيَجِبُ عَلَيْهَا الرَّجْمُ فِي شَيْ‏ءٍ مِنَ الْحَالَاتِ قَالَ إِذَا زَنَتْ ثَمَانَ مَرَّاتٍ يَجِبُ عَلَيْهَا الرَّجْمُ قُلْتُ كَيْفَ صَارَ فِي ثَمَانِ مَرَّاتٍ قَالَ لِأَنَّ الْحُرَّ إِذَا زَنَى أَرْبَعَ مَرَّاتٍ وَ أُقِيمَ عَلَيْهِ الْحَدُّ قُتِلَ فَإِذَا زَنَتِ الْأَمَةُ ثَمَانَ مَرَّاتٍ رُجِمَتْ فِي التَّاسِعَةِ

قُلْتُ وَ مَا الْعِلَّةُ فِي ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ رَحِمَهَا أَنْ يَجْمَعَ عَلَيْهَا رِبْقَ الرِّقِّ وَ حَدَّ الْحُرِّ ثُمَّ قَالَ وَ عَلَى إِمَامِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ أَنْ يَدْفَعَ ثَمَنَهُ إِلَى مَوْلَاهُ مِنْ سَهْمِ الرِّقَابِ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Asbagh Bin Asbagh, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman, from Marwan Bin Muslim, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara, or from Bureyd Al Ajaly, the doubt is, from Muhammad who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘A slave woman commits adultery’. Heasws said: ‘She would be whipped fifty’. I said, ‘So if she repeats?’ Heasws said: ‘She would be whipped fifty’. I said, ‘Would stoning be Obligated upon her from any of the situations?’ Heasws said: ‘If she were to commit adultery eight times, the stoning would be Obligated upon her’. I said, ‘How did it come to be eight times?’ Heasws said: ‘Because the free man when he commits adultery four times, and the Penalty (Hadd) is established upon him, he is killed. So when the slave woman commits adultery eight times, she would be stoned during the ninth’.

I said, ‘And what is the reason with regards to that?’ So heasws said: ‘Allahazwj has been Merciful to her that Heazwj would Gather upon her the rope of slavery and the Penalty (Hadd) of the free’. Then heasws said: ‘And it is upon the Imamasws of the Muslims that he hand over her price to her master from the portion of the slaves’.
en.hubeali.text: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Asbagh Bin Asbagh, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman, from Marwan Bin Muslim, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara, or from Bureyd Al Ajaly, the doubt is, from Muhammad who said, ‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘A slave woman commits adultery’. Heasws said: ‘She would be whipped fifty’. I said, ‘So if she repeats?’ Heasws said: ‘She would be whipped fifty’. I said, ‘Would stoning be Obligated upon her from any of the situations?’ Heasws said: ‘If she were to commit adultery eight times, the stoning would be Obligated upon her’. I said, ‘How did it come to be eight times?’ Heasws said: ‘Because the free man when he commits adultery four times, and the Penalty (Hadd) is established upon him, he is killed. So when the slave woman commits adultery eight times, she would be stoned during the ninth’. I said, ‘And what is the reason with regards to that?’ So heasws said: ‘Allahazwj has been Merciful to her that Heazwj would Gather upon her the rope of slavery and the Penalty (Hadd) of the free’. Then heasws said: ‘And it is upon the Imamasws of the Muslims that he hand over her price to her master from the portion of the slaves’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ الْأَصْبَغِ بْنِ الْأَصْبَغِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ مَرْوَانَ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ زُرَارَةَ أَوْ عَنْ بُرَيْدٍ الْعِجْلِيِّ الشَّكُّ مِنْ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ

titles.ar: الكافي
titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) كَانَتْ لِي جَارِيَةٌ فَزَنَتْ أَحُدُّهَا قَالَ نَعَمْ وَ لَكِنْ لَيَكُونُ ذَلِكَ فِي سِرٍّ لِحَالِ السُّلْطَانِ .
arabic.text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) كَانَتْ لِي جَارِيَةٌ فَزَنَتْ أَحُدُّهَا قَالَ نَعَمْ وَ لَكِنْ لَيَكُونُ ذَلِكَ فِي سِرٍّ لِحَالِ السُّلْطَانِ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Anbasat Bin Mus’ab Al Aabid who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘There was a slave girl for me, so she commited adultery. Shall I (apply the) Penalty (Hadd) on her?’ Heasws said: ‘Yes, but that should happen in secret, due to the state of the authorities’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Anbasat Bin Mus’ab Al Aabid who said, ‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘There was a slave girl for me, so she commited adultery. Shall I (apply the) Penalty (Hadd) on her?’ Heasws said: ‘Yes, but that should happen in secret, due to the state of the authorities’.

segments: إِذَا زَنَى الْعَبْدُ ضُرِبَ خَمْسِينَ فَإِنْ عَادَ ضُرِبَ خَمْسِينَ فَإِنْ عَادَ ضُرِبَ خَمْسِينَ إِلَى ثَمَانِي مَرَّاتٍ فَإِنْ زَنَى ثَمَانِيَ مَرَّاتٍ قُتِلَ وَ أَدَّى الْإِمَامُ قِيمَتَهُ إِلَى مَوْلَاهُ مِنْ بَيْتِ الْمَالِ .
arabic.text: إِذَا زَنَى الْعَبْدُ ضُرِبَ خَمْسِينَ فَإِنْ عَادَ ضُرِبَ خَمْسِينَ فَإِنْ عَادَ ضُرِبَ خَمْسِينَ إِلَى ثَمَانِي مَرَّاتٍ فَإِنْ زَنَى ثَمَانِيَ مَرَّاتٍ قُتِلَ وَ أَدَّى الْإِمَامُ قِيمَتَهُ إِلَى مَوْلَاهُ مِنْ بَيْتِ الْمَالِ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Nasr, from Humeyd Bin Ziyad,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the slave commits adultery, he would be whipped fifty (lashes). So if he repeats, he would be whipped fifty (lashes). So if he repeats, he would be whipped fifty (lashes), up to eight times. So if he commits adultery eight times, he would be killed (for the ninth time), and the Imam<sup>asws</sup> would pay his price to his master from the public treasury’.

So if he repeats, he would be whipped fifty (lashes), up to eight times. So if he commits adultery eight times, he would be killed (for the ninth time), and the Imam<sup>asws</sup> would pay his price to his master from the public treasury’.

So he<sup>asws</sup> ordered a man to whip both of them, and separate what is between the two of them. He whipped each one of the two with fifty lashes’.

arabic.text: يُجْلَدُ الْمُكَاتَبُ إِذَا زَنَى عَلَى قَدْرِ مَا أُعْتِقَ مِنْهُ فَإِنْ قَذَفَ الْمُحْصَنَةَ فَعَلَيْهِ أَنْ يُجْلَدَ ثَمَانِينَ حُرّاً كَانَ أَوْ مَمْلُوكاً .

titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي مُكَاتَبَةٍ زَنَتْ قَالَ يُنْظَرُ مَا أُخِذَ مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِهَا فَيَكُونُ فِيهَا حَدُّ الْحُرَّةِ وَ مَا لَمْ يُقْضَ فَيَكُونُ فِيهِ حَدُّ الْأَمَةِ

وَ قَالَ فِي مُكَاتَبَةٍ زَنَتْ وَ قَدْ أُعْتِقَ مِنْهَا ثَلَاثَةُ أَرْبَاعٍ وَ بَقِيَ رُبُعٌ فَجُلِدَتْ ثَلَاثَةَ أَرْبَاعِ الْحَدِّ حِسَابَ الْحُرَّةِ عَلَى مِائَةٍ فَذَلِكَ خَمْسَةٌ وَ سَبْعُونَ سَوْطاً وَ جَلْدَ رُبُعِهَا حِسَابَ خَمْسِينَ مِنَ الْأَمَةِ اثْنَيْ عَشَرَ سَوْطاً وَ نِصْفاً فَذَلِكَ سَبْعَةٌ وَ ثَمَانُونَ جَلْدَةً وَ نِصْفٌ وَ أَبَى أَنْ يَرْجُمَهَا وَ أَنْ يَنْفِيَهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ يُبَيَّنَ عِتْقُهَا .
arabic.text:
قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي مُكَاتَبَةٍ زَنَتْ قَالَ يُنْظَرُ مَا أُخِذَ مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِهَا فَيَكُونُ فِيهَا حَدُّ الْحُرَّةِ وَ مَا لَمْ يُقْضَ فَيَكُونُ فِيهِ حَدُّ الْأَمَةِ

وَ قَالَ فِي مُكَاتَبَةٍ زَنَتْ وَ قَدْ أُعْتِقَ مِنْهَا ثَلَاثَةُ أَرْبَاعٍ وَ بَقِيَ رُبُعٌ فَجُلِدَتْ ثَلَاثَةَ أَرْبَاعِ الْحَدِّ حِسَابَ الْحُرَّةِ عَلَى مِائَةٍ فَذَلِكَ خَمْسَةٌ وَ سَبْعُونَ سَوْطاً وَ جَلْدَ رُبُعِهَا حِسَابَ خَمْسِينَ مِنَ الْأَمَةِ اثْنَيْ عَشَرَ سَوْطاً وَ نِصْفاً فَذَلِكَ سَبْعَةٌ وَ ثَمَانُونَ جَلْدَةً وَ نِصْفٌ وَ أَبَى أَنْ يَرْجُمَهَا وَ أَنْ يَنْفِيَهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ يُبَيَّنَ عِتْقُهَا .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus Bin Aqeel, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineenasws judged regarding a contracted (slave girl) who committed adultery. Heasws said: ‘Look at what is taken from her contract, for there happens to be in it a Penalty (Hadd) of the free, and whatever has not been fulfilled, so there would happen to be in it a Penalty (Hadd) of the slave girl’.

And heasws said regarding a contracted (slave girl) who committed adultery, and she had been emanicpated (librated) from three-quarters of it, and there remained one quarter (to be fulfilled). So she would be whipped three-quarters of the Penalty (Hadd) of the free woman upon a hundred, so that would be seventy five lashes. And she would be whipped a quarter of the number of fifty from the (Penalty (Hadd) of the) slave girl, being twelve and a half lashes. So that come to eighty seven and a half lashes. And heasws refused to stone her and exile her before her emancipation is manifested’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus Bin Aqeel, from Muhammad Bin Qays, (It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineenasws judged regarding a contracted (slave girl) who committed adultery. Heasws said: ‘Look at what is taken from her contract, for there happens to be in it a Penalty (Hadd) of the free, and whatever has not been fulfilled, so there would happen to be in it a Penalty (Hadd) of the slave girl’. And heasws said regarding a contracted (slave girl) who committed adultery, and she had been emanicpated (librated) from three-quarters of it, and there remained one quarter (to be fulfilled). So she would be whipped three-quarters of the Penalty (Hadd) of the free woman upon a hundred, so that would be seventy five lashes. And she would be whipped a quarter of the number of fifty from the (Penalty (Hadd) of the) slave girl, being twelve and a half lashes. So that come to eighty seven and a half lashes. And heasws refused to stone her and exile her before her emancipation is manifested’.

segments: إِلَّا أَنَّ يُونُسَ قَالَ يُؤْخَذُ السَّوْطُ مِنْ نِصْفِهِ فَيُضْرَبُ بِهِ وَ كَذَلِكَ الْأَقَلُّ وَ الْأَكْثَرُ .
arabic.text: إِلَّا أَنَّ يُونُسَ قَالَ يُؤْخَذُ السَّوْطُ مِنْ نِصْفِهِ فَيُضْرَبُ بِهِ وَ كَذَلِكَ الْأَقَلُّ وَ الْأَكْثَرُ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, and from his father, from Ibn Abu Najran, altogether from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> similar to it, except that Yunus said, ‘The whip would be grabbed from its halfway, so he would whip with it, and similar to that is for the lesser (amount of lashes) and the more’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, and from his father, from Ibn Abu Najran, altogether from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> similar to it, except that Yunus said, ‘The whip would be grabbed from its halfway, so he would whip with it, and similar to that is for the lesser (amount of lashes) and the more’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ يُونُسَ وَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي نَجْرَانَ جَمِيعاً عَنْ عَاصِمِ بْنِ حُمَيْدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ قَيْسٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) مِثْلَهُ

titles.ar: الكافي
titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: يُضْرَبُ حَدَّ الْحُرِّ ثَمَانِينَ إِنْ أَدَّى مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِهِ شَيْئاً أَوْ لَمْ يُؤَدِّ قِيلَ لَهُ فَإِنْ زَنَى وَ هُوَ مُكَاتَبٌ وَ لَمْ يُؤَدِّ شَيْئاً مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِهِ قَالَ هُوَ حَقُّ اللَّهِ يُطْرَحُ عَنْهُ مِنَ الْحَدِّ خَمْسُونَ جَلْدَةً وَ يُضْرَبُ خَمْسِينَ .
arabic.text: يُضْرَبُ حَدَّ الْحُرِّ ثَمَانِينَ إِنْ أَدَّى مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِهِ شَيْئاً أَوْ لَمْ يُؤَدِّ قِيلَ لَهُ فَإِنْ زَنَى وَ هُوَ مُكَاتَبٌ وَ لَمْ يُؤَدِّ شَيْئاً مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِهِ قَالَ هُوَ حَقُّ اللَّهِ يُطْرَحُ عَنْهُ مِنَ الْحَدِّ خَمْسُونَ جَلْدَةً وَ يُضْرَبُ خَمْسِينَ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Mahboub, from Hammad, from Suleyman Bin Khalid,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having been asked about the contracted (slave) who fabricated upon a Muslim man. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He would be whipped a Penalty (Hadd) of the free, eighty (lashes), whether he has paid anything from his contract or has not paid’. It was said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘So if he commits adultery and he is contracted, and has not paid anything from his contract?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is a Right of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>. Fifty lashes would be staved off from him, and he would be whipped fifty’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Mahboub, from Hammad, from Suleyman Bin Khalid,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having been asked about the contracted (slave) who fabricated upon a Muslim man. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He would be whipped a Penalty (Hadd) of the free, eighty (lashes), whether he has paid anything from his contract or has not paid’. It was said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘So if he commits adultery and he is contracted, and has not paid anything from his contract?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is a Right of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>. Fifty lashes would be staved off from him, and he would be whipped fifty’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ عَنِ الْمُكَاتَبِ افْتَرَى عَلَى رَجُلٍ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ

titles.ar: الكافي
titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: الْعَبْدُ إِذَا أَقَرَّ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ عِنْدَ الْإِمَامِ مَرَّةً أَنَّهُ سَرَقَ قَطَعَهُ وَ الْأَمَةُ إِذَا أَقَرَّتْ عَلَى نَفْسِهَا عِنْدَ الْإِمَامِ بِالسَّرِقَةِ قَطَعَهَا .
arabic.text: الْعَبْدُ إِذَا أَقَرَّ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ عِنْدَ الْإِمَامِ مَرَّةً أَنَّهُ سَرَقَ قَطَعَهُ وَ الْأَمَةُ إِذَا أَقَرَّتْ عَلَى نَفْسِهَا عِنْدَ الْإِمَامِ بِالسَّرِقَةِ قَطَعَهَا .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Zureys Al Kunasy,

Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘The slave, when he accepts upon himself in the presence of the Imam<sup>asws</sup>, once, that he has stolen, and the slave girl, when she accpets upon herself in the presence of the Imam<sup>asws</sup> with the theft, they would both be cut’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Zureys Al Kunasy,

Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘The slave, when he accepts upon himself in the presence of the Imam<sup>asws</sup>, once, that he has stolen, and the slave girl, when she accpets upon herself in the presence of the Imam<sup>asws</sup> with the theft, they would both be cut’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنِ ابْنِ رِئَابٍ عَنْ ضُرَيْسٍ الْكُنَاسِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: الكافي
titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ عَبْدٍ مَمْلُوكٍ قَذَفَ حُرّاً قَالَ يُجْلَدُ ثَمَانِينَ هَذَا مِنْ حُقُوقِ النَّاسِ فَأَمَّا مَا كَانَ مِنْ حُقُوقِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَإِنَّهُ يُضْرَبُ نِصْفَ الْحَدِّ قُلْتُ الَّذِي مِنْ حُقُوقِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مَا هُوَ قَالَ إِذَا زَنَى أَوْ شَرِبَ خَمْراً فَهَذَا مِنَ الْحُقُوقِ الَّتِي يُضْرَبُ فِيهَا نِصْفَ الْحَدِّ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ عَبْدٍ مَمْلُوكٍ قَذَفَ حُرّاً قَالَ يُجْلَدُ ثَمَانِينَ هَذَا مِنْ حُقُوقِ النَّاسِ فَأَمَّا مَا كَانَ مِنْ حُقُوقِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَإِنَّهُ يُضْرَبُ نِصْفَ الْحَدِّ قُلْتُ الَّذِي مِنْ حُقُوقِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مَا هُوَ قَالَ إِذَا زَنَى أَوْ شَرِبَ خَمْراً فَهَذَا مِنَ الْحُقُوقِ الَّتِي يُضْرَبُ فِيهَا نِصْفَ الْحَدِّ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Sayf Bin Umeyr, from Abu Bakr Al Hazramy who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about an owned slave who slandered a free (person). Heasws said: ‘He would be whipped eighty (lashes). This is from the rights of the people. So as for what was from the Rights of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic, so he would be whipped half the Penalty (Hadd)’. I said, ‘That which is from the Right of Allahazwj, what is it?’ Heasws said: ‘When he commits adultery or drinks wine, so these are from the Rights for which he would be whipped half the Penalty (Hadd) with regards to it’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Sayf Bin Umeyr, from Abu Bakr Al Hazramy who said, ‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about an owned slave who slandered a free (person). Heasws said: ‘He would be whipped eighty (lashes). This is from the rights of the people. So as for what was from the Rights of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic, so he would be whipped half the Penalty (Hadd)’. I said, ‘That which is from the Right of Allahazwj, what is it?’ Heasws said: ‘When he commits adultery or drinks wine, so these are from the Rights for which he would be whipped half the Penalty (Hadd) with regards to it’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ سَيْفِ بْنِ عَمِيرَةَ عَنْ أَبِي بَكْرٍ الْحَضْرَمِيِّ قَالَ

titles.ar: الكافي
titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) عَبْدِي إِذَا سَرَقَنِي لَمْ أَقْطَعْهُ وَ عَبْدِي إِذَا سَرَقَ غَيْرِي قَطَعْتُهُ وَ عَبْدُ الْإِمَارَةِ إِذَا سَرَقَ لَمْ أَقْطَعْهُ لِأَنَّهُ فَيْ‏ءٌ .
arabic.text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) عَبْدِي إِذَا سَرَقَنِي لَمْ أَقْطَعْهُ وَ عَبْدِي إِذَا سَرَقَ غَيْرِي قَطَعْتُهُ وَ عَبْدُ الْإِمَارَةِ إِذَا سَرَقَ لَمْ أَقْطَعْهُ لِأَنَّهُ فَيْ‏ءٌ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineenasws said: ‘If myasws slave steals from measws, Iasws would not cut him, and if myasws slave steals from others, Iasws would cut him, and a slave of the emirate, if he were to steal, Iasws would not cut him because he is ‘Fey’ (war booty)’.
en.hubeali.text: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineenasws said: ‘If myasws slave steals from measws, Iasws would not cut him, and if myasws slave steals from others, Iasws would cut him, and a slave of the emirate, if he were to steal, Iasws would not cut him because he is ‘Fey’ (war booty)’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ النَّوْفَلِيِّ عَنِ السَّكُونِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: الكافي
titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: تْ مَا أَدَّيْتُ مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِي فَأَنَا بِهِ حُرَّةٌ عَلَى حِسَابِ ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ لَهَا نَعَمْ فَأَدَّتْ بَعْضَ مُكَاتَبَتِهَا وَ جَامَعَهَا مَوْلَاهَا بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ إِنْ كَانَ اسْتَكْرَهَهَا عَلَى ذَلِكَ ضُرِبَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ بِقَدْرِ مَا أَدَّتْ مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِهَا وَ دُرِئَ عَنْهُ مِنَ الْحَدِّ بِقَدْرِ مَا بَقِيَ مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِهَا وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ تَابَعَتْهُ كَانَتْ شَرِيكَتَهُ فِي الْحَدِّ ضُرِبَتْ مِثْلَ مَا يُضْرَبُ .
arabic.text: تْ مَا أَدَّيْتُ مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِي فَأَنَا بِهِ حُرَّةٌ عَلَى حِسَابِ ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ لَهَا نَعَمْ فَأَدَّتْ بَعْضَ مُكَاتَبَتِهَا وَ جَامَعَهَا مَوْلَاهَا بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ إِنْ كَانَ اسْتَكْرَهَهَا عَلَى ذَلِكَ ضُرِبَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ بِقَدْرِ مَا أَدَّتْ مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِهَا وَ دُرِئَ عَنْهُ مِنَ الْحَدِّ بِقَدْرِ مَا بَقِيَ مِنْ مُكَاتَبَتِهَا وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ تَابَعَتْهُ كَانَتْ شَرِيكَتَهُ فِي الْحَدِّ ضُرِبَتْ مِثْلَ مَا يُضْرَبُ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Salih Bin Saeed, from Al Husayn Bin Khalid,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having been asked about a man who had a slave girl, so he contracted her. So she said, ‘Whatever I pay off from my contract, so I would be free by it upon that accounting’. So he said to her, ‘Yes’. So she paid off some of her contract, and her master copulated with her after that. So heasws said: ‘If she was unwilling upon that, he would be whipped from the Penalty (Hadd) by the measurement of whatever she has paid off from her contract, and the Penalty (Hadd) would be staved off from him by the measurement of whatever remained from her contract. And if she had obeyed him, she would be his participant with regards to the Penalty (Hadd). She would be whipped similar to what he would be whipped’.
en.hubeali.text: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Salih Bin Saeed, from Al Husayn Bin Khalid, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having been asked about a man who had a slave girl, so he contracted her. So she said, ‘Whatever I pay off from my contract, so I would be free by it upon that accounting’. So he said to her, ‘Yes’. So she paid off some of her contract, and her master copulated with her after that. So heasws said: ‘If she was unwilling upon that, he would be whipped from the Penalty (Hadd) by the measurement of whatever she has paid off from her contract, and the Penalty (Hadd) would be staved off from him by the measurement of whatever remained from her contract. And if she had obeyed him, she would be his participant with regards to the Penalty (Hadd). She would be whipped similar to what he would be whipped’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ صَالِحِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ عَنْ رَجُلٍ كَانَتْ لَهُ أَمَةٌ فَكَاتَبَهَا فَقَالَ

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ

titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: الْمَمْلُوكُ إِذَا سَرَقَ مِنْ مَوَالِيهِ لَمْ يُقْطَعْ فَإِذَا سَرَقَ مِنْ غَيْرِ مَوَالِيهِ قُطِعَ .
arabic.text: الْمَمْلُوكُ إِذَا سَرَقَ مِنْ مَوَالِيهِ لَمْ يُقْطَعْ فَإِذَا سَرَقَ مِنْ غَيْرِ مَوَالِيهِ قُطِعَ .

segments: Ali, from his father, from Salih Bin Saeed, from Yunus, from one of our companions,
Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘The owned (slave), when he steals from his master, he would not be cut. So if he steals from other than his master, he would be cut’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali, from his father, from Salih Bin Saeed, from Yunus, from one of our companions,

Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘The owned (slave), when he steals from his master, he would not be cut. So if he steals from other than his master, he would be cut’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيٌّ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ صَالِحِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ يُونُسَ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.en: Al-Kafi

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

segments: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي الْعَبِيدِ وَ الْإِمَاءِ إِذَا زَنَى أَحَدُهُمْ أَنْ يُجْلَدَ خَمْسِينَ جَلْدَةً إِنْ كَانَ مُسْلِماً أَوْ كَافِراً أَوْ نَصْرَانِيّاً وَ لَا يُرْجَمَ وَ لَا يُنْفَى .
arabic.text: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي الْعَبِيدِ وَ الْإِمَاءِ إِذَا زَنَى أَحَدُهُمْ أَنْ يُجْلَدَ خَمْسِينَ جَلْدَةً إِنْ كَانَ مُسْلِماً أَوْ كَافِراً أَوْ نَصْرَانِيّاً وَ لَا يُرْجَمَ وَ لَا يُنْفَى .

segments: Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> judged regarding the slave men and the slave women when one of them commited adultery, that he would be whipped eighty lashes whether he was a Muslim, or an Infidel, or a Christian, and would neither be stoned nor exiled’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> judged regarding the slave men and the slave women when one of them commited adultery, that he would be whipped eighty lashes whether he was a Muslim, or an Infidel, or a Christian, and would neither be stoned nor exiled’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيٌّ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي نَجْرَانَ عَنْ عَاصِمِ بْنِ حُمَيْدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ قَيْسٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
